channel.name: PLC to OpenEMR
channel.description: Reads PLC JSON snapshots from plc_exporter and transforms vital signs to HL7 v2 ORU^R01 messages ready for OpenEMR ingestion.

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Parse PLC JSON snapshot
Build HL7 ORU^R01 — Vital Signs
Build FHIR Observation Bundle
